channel.title: blissedhappiness TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from blissedhappiness

item.title: When healthy hits different😋 Fresh raspberries + 95% dark chocolate = the best candy of your life☺️ Freeze for 30 mins and thank me later. Full of antioxidants, zero guilt and major sweet tooth satisfaction😍🍓 Save this for when your sweet cravings hit!🍩🍪
item.description: When healthy hits different😋 Fresh raspberries + 95% dark chocolate = the best candy of your life☺️ Freeze for 30 mins and thank me later. Full of antioxidants, zero guilt and major sweet tooth satisfaction😍🍓 Save this for when your sweet cravings hit!🍩🍪
item.author: blissedhappiness

item.title: I’m working on something very special for a small group of you. ✨ A full 6-month transformation experience designed to change your body, habits, mindset, and confidence from the inside out. You’ll get: • A complete meal plan • A structured workout plan •

item.title: Want to feel stronger, leaner, and more confident in just 2 weeks? 🔥 Try my Pilates Challenge and get amazing results — no gym, no crazy workouts, just smart movement that works. 💪✨ Join now — link in bio! 👆 #PilatesChallenge #2WeekChallenge #StrongCore #

item.author: blissedhappiness

item.title: Want pancakes that won’t ruin your abs? 👀🥞 These 2-ingredient banana pancakes are low-cal, high-protein, and taste insane. 🍌💪 Blend 2 bananas + 4 eggs, cook 30 sec per side, and boom — fluffy pancakes with 28g of protein and zero guilt. 🔥 Use avocado oil
item.description: Want pancakes that won’t ruin your abs? 👀🥞 These 2-ingredient banana pancakes are low-cal, high-protein, and taste insane. 🍌💪 Blend 2 bananas + 4 eggs, cook 30 sec per side, and boom — fluffy pancakes with 28g of protein and zero guilt. 🔥 Use avocado oil
item.author: blissedhappiness

item.title: I’ve got two programs for you — one for beginners and one for those ready to level up. 💪✨ If you’re ready to challenge yourself, pick the program that fits your vibe, hit the link in bio 🔗🥹 and let’s get you the body of your dreams before the holidays eve

item.title: “Pilates won’t give you real results… you need to lift weights.” 😭 That’s what people say — until they actually do Pilates correctly. I changed my entire body with mat Pilates, mindful movement, deep core training, and consistency. 🫶🥹 No heavy weights. No

item.author: blissedhappiness

item.title: A simple guide for busy women who want to lose fat, tone up & still enjoy food 💁🏼‍♀️ EVERY DAY (your basics): • Greek yogurt or cottage cheese – high protein, keeps you full • Lean protein (chicken, fish, eggs) – for toning & strength • Lots of veggies –
item.description: A simple guide for busy women who want to lose fat, tone up & still enjoy food 💁🏼‍♀️ EVERY DAY (your basics): • Greek yogurt or cottage cheese – high protein, keeps you full • Lean protein (chicken, fish, eggs) – for toning & strength • Lots of veggies –
item.author: blissedhappiness
